headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: IDEX (NYSE:IEX) Vs The Rest Of The Gas and Liquid Handling Stocks
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of IDEX (NYSE:IEX) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q4 gas and liquid handling earnings season.
